grafeoR 0.0.0.9000
  • Home

    • Articles
    • Getting Started with grafeoR
    • OpenFlights Analysis with grafeoR

Package index

Core database API

Open embedded Grafeo databases, execute GQL, and inspect engine metadata.

grafeo_db()
Create an embedded Grafeo database handle
grafeo_version()
Return the linked Grafeo engine version

Bundled sample data

Load the offline OpenFlights subset used by examples and vignettes.

openflights_sample_data()
Load the bundled OpenFlights sample dataset

Results and package docs

Helpers for working with query results and package-level overview topics.

as.data.frame(<grafeo_result>)
Convert a Grafeo result to a data frame
print(<grafeo_result>)
Print a Grafeo query result
grafeoR grafeoR-package
grafeoR

On this page
